title: Voglera hispanica
taxonomy: Voglera hispanica is a genus of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to the Iberian Peninsula, specifically in the southwestern region of the Pyrenees. Voglera hispanica is a rare and threatened species, classified as Critically Endangered by the International Union for Conservation of Nature (IUCN). Further classification of Voglera hispanica includes its rank as a species within the Kingdom Plantae.
